To stay productive and energized during busy cycles, consider adopting a structured routine that incorporates time management methods like the Pomodoro Technique to split work into manageable intervals. Additionally, setting clear, achievable daily goals can keep your workload organized and prevent overwhelm.

Given your moderate anxiety during busy production cycles, consider incorporating a wind-down routine each evening that includes 10 minutes of mindful meditation or progressive muscle relaxation to help quiet your mind.
